title: Tenderly Cooked Japanese Lamb Skewers
description: A cultured and comforting Japanese dish featuring lamb loin chops, air-fried to perfection with a velvety texture, also suitable for vegan-friendly options by substituting lamb with portobello mushrooms or tofu

ingredients.name: lamb loin chops
ingredients.notes: or portobello mushrooms/tofu for vegan option

instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, brown sugar, grated ginger, and garlic powder
Add the lamb loin chops to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes
Thread the marinated lamb onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Air-fry the lamb skewers for 12-15 minutes, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving
Serve the lamb skewers hot, garnished with sliced green onions and sesame seeds
